phrases.intent_en: Ask where to catch the cable car from Lido
phrases.text_local: Onde apanho o teleférico vindo do Lido?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih uh-PAHN-nyoo AW teh-lih-FEH-ree-koo VEEN-doo DOO LEE-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: In Funchal, transport staff prioritize precise station names over landmarks. Locals expect direct, location-specific answers.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na Estação do Jardim Tropical.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH shtuh-SOWN DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN troo-pee-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the Jardim Tropical Station.

responses.english: Good morning, at the Jardim Tropical Station.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH shtuh-SOWN DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN troo-pee-KAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, na Estação do Jardim Tropical.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Jardim Tropical station is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde fica a estação do Jardim Tropical?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shtuh-SOWN DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN troo-pee-KAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The Jardim Tropical station is the third stop, after Monte, leading to the botanical garden.

likely_response.local: No topo, após a estação do Monte.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO TAW-poo, uh-PAWSH AH shtuh-SOWN DOO MOHNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: At the top, after the Monte station.

responses.english: At the top, after the Monte station.
responses.phonetic: NOO TAW-poo, uh-PAWSH AH shtuh-SOWN DOO MOHNG-tih.
responses.french: No topo, após a estação do Monte.
